creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you for your kind suggestion. I agree that we could definitely use better infrastructure (similar to Crowdin, as you've mentioned) here. I would personally prefer open-source solutions though. Anyways, please submit your request to doceng@, since they are the appropriate team to make such decisions.

In the meantime, you are more than welcome to help translate documentation and submit it back to the project. Just make sure to check with project lead of individual documentation projects first to avoid duplicate work. A complete list of language projects can be found here: https://www.freebsd.org/docproj/translations.html.
